title: langchain-ai/langgraph
abstract: Low-level orchestration framework for building stateful agents. Trusted by companies shaping the future of agents – including Klarna, Replit, Elastic, and more – LangGraph is a low-level orchestration...
abstract_zh: 来个硬核推荐——别看我老了，但我对 **langgraph** 依然充满爱意！这货能在写周报时帮你生成段子，调Bug时给你提供金点子。关键是它超懂你，理解度堪比你的灵魂知己，但效率却高出N倍！再也不怕加班到深夜啦，快来试试吧！
